description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front features a gated driveway with a blue car parked in a covered garage, and a fenced yard with a wooden gate. Large bay windows are prominent on the front facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the bungalow includes a fenced backyard with a visible hot tub and hammock, suggesting leisure and relaxation spaces. The exterior walls are primarily white, contrasted by dark window frames and a gray garage door. The overall structure is surrounded by a wooden fence, creating a private and secure urban residence.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, bay windows, a gated driveway, and fenced yards, featuring white walls and a blue car in the garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated driveway, blue car in the garage, bay windows, and fenced front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bay window on the front facade, the full length of the wooden fence, and the hot tub in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, hot tub, hammock, and the back entrance of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, blue car, and the continuation of the wooden fence around the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: bay window on front facade with asymmetrical side and rear windows
